title: Ignition Point
description: Ready to accelerate. Scroll or use the arrow keys to drive through my journey.

title: Unity & C# Foundations
description: Built a strong foundation in Unity Engine and C# through project-based self-learning using YouTube resources. Explored gameplay scripting, object-oriented programming, Unity's component system, scene management, prefabs, and version control to establish the core skills required for game development.

title: 3D Asset Creation
description: Learned Blender to design and optimize low-poly vehicles, roads, intersections, and environment assets for real-time applications. Integrated custom models into Unity using an efficient asset pipeline while focusing on game-ready optimization and modular asset creation.

title: Core Gameplay Prototype
description: Developed the foundation of the driving simulator by implementing player-controlled vehicle movement, Rigidbody physics, camera systems, collision detection, checkpoints, and interactive gameplay mechanics. Established the core gameplay loop for the traffic learning experience.

title: Traffic Learning Systems
description: Integrated educational gameplay mechanics including traffic rule validation, scoring, real-time feedback, modular UI, and progression systems. Focused on combining simulation with gamification to create an engaging learner-driver experience.

title: Road Rules Simulator
description: Currently expanding the playable Unity WebGL prototype into a comprehensive learner-driver training simulator. Planned improvements include additional driving scenarios, new levels, AI-controlled traffic, richer environments, enhanced gameplay systems, performance optimization, and advanced learning analytics.
